user.title: Step 1/5: Livoltek API Credentials
user.description:
Enter your Livoltek API credentials.

**How to get credentials:**
1. Go to [livoltek-portal.com](https://www.livoltek-portal.com/) and log in
2. Open **My Profile** (top right corner)
3. Click **Generate Token** to create your User Token
4. Click **Secure ID** to get your Security ID (secuid) and API Key

site.title: Step 2/5: Select Site
site.description: Select the site (power station) you want to monitor.

device.title: Step 3/5: Select Device
device.description: Select a device and set the update interval.

groups.title: Step 4/5: Data Sources
groups.description: Select which data groups to fetch. At least one must be selected.

control.title: Step 5/5: BESS Control (optional)
control.description: Enter account and password for inverter control. Leave blank for monitoring only.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check secuid and key.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Livoltek API.
error.no_sites: No sites found for this account.
error.no_devices: No devices found for this site.
error.no_groups_selected: At least one data group must be selected.
